text: Personal liability established under Section 315.072 (Lien) may be enforced by bringing suit.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.091 — Suit on Lien

Personal liability established under Section 315.072 (Lien) may be enforced by bringing suit.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Personal liability established under Section 315.072 (Lien) may be enforced by bringing suit.
